mapper.select: select id, order_id, order_created_time, wait_pay_time, timeout_canceled_time, user_pay_time, wait_allocation_time, completed_time, user_canceled_time, wait_refund_time, refund_success_time from order_status_timeline where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into order_status_timeline(id, order_id, order_created_time, wait_pay_time, timeout_canceled_time, user_pay_time, wait_allocation_time, completed_time, user_canceled_time, wait_refund_time, refund_success_time) values (#{id}, #{orderId}, #{orderCreatedTime}, #{waitPayTime}, #{timeoutCanceledTime}, #{userPayTime}, #{waitAllocationTime}, #{completedTime}, #{userCanceledTime}, #{waitRefundTime}, #{refundSuccessTime})

insert into order_status_timeline(id,order_id, order_created_time, wait_pay_time, timeout_canceled_time, user_pay_time, wait_allocation_time, completed_time, user_canceled_time, wait_refund_time, refund_success_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.orderId}, #{entity.orderCreatedTime}, #{entity.waitPayTime}, #{entity.timeoutCanceledTime}, #{entity.userPayTime}, #{entity.waitAllocationTime}, #{entity.completedTime}, #{entity.userCanceledTime}, #{entity.waitRefundTime}, #{entity.refundSuccessTime})

insert into order_status_timeline(id,order_id, order_created_time, wait_pay_time, timeout_canceled_time, user_pay_time, wait_allocation_time, completed_time, user_canceled_time, wait_refund_time, refund_success_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.orderId}, #{entity.orderCreatedTime}, #{entity.waitPayTime}, #{entity.timeoutCanceledTime}, #{entity.userPayTime}, #{entity.waitAllocationTime}, #{entity.completedTime}, #{entity.userCanceledTime}, #{entity.waitRefundTime}, #{entity.refundSuccessTime})
on duplicate key update order_id = values(order_id), order_created_time = values(order_created_time), wait_pay_time = values(wait_pay_time), timeout_canceled_time = values(timeout_canceled_time), user_pay_time = values(user_pay_time), wait_allocation_time = values(wait_allocation_time), completed_time = values(completed_time), user_canceled_time = values(user_canceled_time), wait_refund_time = values(wait_refund_time), refund_success_time = values(refund_success_time)
